description:
Extracting data out of SAP environments such as CRM or databases can be complicated. In addition, companies are increasingly seeking to add value to their data by connecting with cloud native services that will allow them to innovate around Machine Learning, IoT or Analytic capability tools. Discover how this is now possible with Syntax CxLink, a certified SAP solution that enables SAP to integrate with AWS services in a native language, in real-time and using high volume of loads. Learn more about AWS Premier and SAP Competency Partner Syntax and their solutions here: https://www.syntax.com/solutions/sap/cxlink/.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS #AmazonWebServices #CloudComputing #ThisIsMyArchitecture
fulltitle: Syntax: Extract and Leverage SAP Data with AWS Services
